overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing power-armored Space Marines battling Tyranid aliens in a rain-soaked gothic cathedral city. The player engages in intense melee combat, traverses debris-filled plazas, and ascends grand staircases while fighting swarms of enemies amid burning ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic bridge covered in tyranid biomass

events.description: player executes melee attack on tyranid warrior with chainsword
blood splatter effect as enemy is defeated in close combat

agents.ego_description: engaging tyranid enemies in close-quarters melee combat on the bridge, using chainsword attacks

notable_agents.action: tyranid warrior attacking with claws and tentacles
squadmate fighting alongside with bolter fire

entered.detail: gothic stone bridge with ornate railings covered in red tyranid biomass
massive gothic cathedral with spires visible in the stormy background
red organic tyranid growth covering the ground and structures
orange flames burning in the distance providing light

segments.scene_description: The player character stands on a gothic stone bridge covered in red tyranid biomass, engaging in intense melee combat with alien creatures. The massive cathedral looms in the stormy background while fires burn in the distance, and a squadmate provides support from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: devastated cathedral plaza with scattered fires

events.description: transitioning from combat stance to running traversal movement
entering open plaza area with large robed statues and burning debris

agents.ego_description: running through the debris-filled plaza toward the cathedral, weapon at ready

entered.detail: open paved area littered with debris and organic matter
large stone statue of robed figure on pedestal
multiple fires burning among the debris
metal grate sections embedded in the stone pavement

segments.scene_description: The player runs through a wide-open cathedral plaza littered with debris and tyranid biomass, passing large robed statues and burning pyres. The gothic cathedral grows larger in view as the character moves away from the bridge combat zone toward the main structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to upper cathedral level

events.description: beginning ascent of wide stone staircase
reaching top of stairs and entering upper balcony area

agents.ego_description: running up the grand stone staircase toward the upper cathedral level, following squadmates

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with ornate steps leading upward
decorative stone balustrades lining the staircase
arched stone entrance at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a grand stone staircase with ornate railings, moving from the open plaza into a more enclosed area. The gothic archway at the top marks the transition to the upper level, with the cathedral facade visible beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper cathedral balcony with combat arena

events.description: aiming bolter at distant tyranid warrior on upper balcony
engaging in close-quarters melee combat with tyranid swarm

agents.ego_description: taking cover to shoot distant enemies, then engaging in brutal melee combat with chainsword

notable_agents.action: large tyranid warrior leaping down from archway to attack

entered.detail: elevated stone platform with gothic architecture overlooking the plaza
large red tyranid creature with glowing elements perched on distant structure
ornate stone archways framing the background

segments.scene_description: On the upper balcony, the player takes aim at a distant tyranid warrior before engaging in close combat. The gothic archways frame the background as the character fights alongside squadmates, with the enemy moving from a distant perch to close range.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a chaotic bridge battle through a ruined plaza and up into the heights of a gothic cathedral. It begins amidst intense melee combat on a stone bridge slick with red biomass, with a massive cathedral and distant fires looming through a storm. As the fighting subsides, the camera follows the character running across a wide-open plaza littered with debris and burning pyres, passing towering robed statues as the cathedral structure grows larger in the frame. The scene then shifts as the player ascends a grand stone staircase with ornate railings, moving from the open air through a gothic archway into a more enclosed upper level. Finally, the perspective opens onto a high balcony where the character takes aim at a distant warrior before engaging in close-quarters combat framed by the cathedral's soaring architecture.
